text: Refactor a 5,000-line legacy Python service into modular packages with full type hints and 90% test coverage.

pipeline_stages.description: Analyse the existing 5,000-line codebase to understand architecture, dependencies, and identify natural module boundaries
Refactor code into modular packages and add comprehensive type hints throughout
Generate test cases to achieve 90% code coverage with unit and integration tests
Review refactored code for quality, maintainability, and adherence to Python best practices

text: Write a regex in JavaScript that matches UK postcodes.
expect: Cheap fast model (Haiku / Gemini Flash / Mistral Small)

text: I have a flaky integration test in our Node.js CI; help me identify likely race conditions.

suggested_questions.question: Can you share the test file and any relevant setup/teardown code?
How often does the test fail, and does it fail consistently on certain conditions?

text: Build a React + Tailwind dashboard component that visualises time-series metrics with brushing and zoom.
Summarise this 3-paragraph press release into a tweet.
Summarise a 200-page board report into a 2-page exec brief, preserving numerical figures exactly.
Summarise weekly Zoom meeting transcripts (~30k tokens each) into action items.
Extract line items, totals and VAT from scanned PDF invoices.
Pull all email addresses and phone numbers out of a 50-page contract.
Convert messy free-text product reviews into JSON with sentiment, topics and aspect ratings.
Write a 1500-word short story in the style of Ursula K Le Guin about an AI that learns to garden.
Draft 5 LinkedIn posts announcing a new B2B SaaS feature, varied in tone.
Write a polite follow-up email to a client who has not replied for 2 weeks.
Generate a 20-page market-research report on the UK ed-tech sector with citations and charts described.

suggested_questions.question: Do you have source materials to cite, or should the model research and generate citations?
options: I'll provide source documents to cite from
Generate citations from the model's training data

suggested_questions.question: For the charts/visualizations, do you need actual chart code (e.g., Python/JavaScript) or just descriptions?
options: Just descriptions of what charts should show

suggested_questions.question: What's your timeline and do you need this as a one-off or iteratively refined?
options: Generate then iterate/refine based on feedback

pipeline_stages.description: Research and synthesise UK ed-tech sector data, trends, and key players
Compose 20-page report with structured sections, narrative flow, and integrated citations
Generate chart descriptions and optional visualization code (Python/JavaScript) for data representation

text: Analyse this CSV of 10k customer transactions and identify churn predictors.

suggested_questions.question: What format is the CSV in, and do you have it ready to upload?
options: Want to describe the structure instead

suggested_questions.question: Do you want statistical analysis only, or predictive model recommendations?

pipeline_stages.description: Parse CSV and extract relevant customer transaction data, handle missing values, data validation
Statistical analysis - correlation with churn, feature importance, pattern identification
Generate predictive model code (logistic regression, random forest, etc.) and recommendations

text: Review a 40-page commercial lease and flag clauses that are unusual or risky for the tenant.

pipeline_stages.description: Extract all lease clauses and their key terms
Evaluate each clause for unusual terms, tenant-unfavorable conditions, and financial/legal risks
Generate a flagged summary report highlighting risky clauses with explanations

text: Solve this system of nonlinear PDEs symbolically and explain the steps.

suggested_questions.question: Do you have the PDEs ready to share, or do you need help formulating them?
options: I need help setting them up
I have them but they're complex

suggested_questions.question: What's your preference for symbolic solving?
options: Pen & paper approach with code verification

suggested_questions.question: What level of mathematical detail do you want in the explanation?

pipeline_stages.description: Set up the system of nonlinear PDEs symbolically using appropriate mathematical library
Apply solution techniques (separation of variables, perturbation methods, Lie groups, etc.)
Verify solutions and analyze their properties and validity
Generate clear, step-by-step explanation of the solution process

text: Help me think through whether to expand into the German market — pros, cons, risks.

suggested_questions.question: Do you have specific market data, financials, or company context you'd like to provide for a deeper analysis?
options: Yes, I'll provide market research or company details

text: Translate this technical white paper from English into Brazilian Portuguese, preserving terminology.
Translate 200 short product descriptions from English to French daily.
Build a chatbot that tutors GCSE maths students step-by-step.
expect: Mid-tier with reasoning (Sonnet / Gemini Pro / GPT-5.4 mini)

suggested_questions.question: Should the chatbot handle handwritten math or just text/typed equations?
Do you need to build the chatbot from scratch or integrate with an existing platform?

pipeline_stages.description: Set up chatbot framework and conversation flow logic
Configure conversational AI for tutoring dialogue with step-by-step explanation capability
Generate pedagogically sound explanations and follow-up questions

text: Power a customer-support chatbot that handles refund and order-status queries.

suggested_questions.question: Does the chatbot need to access external systems (order database, refund processing API)?
options: Yes, it needs to query live databases
Yes, it needs to call external APIs
No, it just provides general information

suggested_questions.question: What platform will this chatbot run on?

pipeline_stages.description: Real-time dialogue handling: Understanding customer intent, asking clarifying questions, maintaining context
Tool integration: Querying order database, checking refund status, processing requests through APIs
Response generation: Crafting natural, helpful replies with retrieved information

text: A reflective journaling companion that asks gentle follow-up questions.
Classify product photos into 30 categories from an e-commerce catalogue.
expect: Vision capable cheap (Gemini Flash / Haiku vision)

text: OCR handwritten doctor notes from scanned charts into searchable text.

suggested_questions.question: Do you need the extracted text structured in any particular format?
options: Structured by fields (date, patient, diagnosis, etc.)

suggested_questions.question: How many charts are you processing?

text: Extract text from these 100 scanned receipts then categorise the spending and produce a monthly summary.

pipeline_stages.description: OCR/extract text from 100 scanned receipt images
Parse extracted text to pull structured data: vendor, amount, category, date
Categorise spending by type and identify patterns
Generate monthly spending summary report with totals by category

text: Translate this Japanese research paper into English then write a 1-page lay summary.

pipeline_stages.description: Translate the Japanese research paper into English
Condense the translated paper into a 1-page lay summary for non-specialist audience

text: Read our codebase, generate API docs, and translate them into Spanish.

pipeline_stages.description: Read and understand the codebase structure, functions, classes, and API endpoints
Generate comprehensive API documentation from the analyzed codebase
Translate the generated API documentation into Spanish

text: Help me with AI stuff.

suggested_questions.question: What do you want to use AI for?
Is this a one-off task or something you'll do regularly?
Will you be working with text, images, files, or code?

text: Build a chatbot that handles English, Arabic, Mandarin and Swahili customer queries.

suggested_questions.question: What type of customer queries will the chatbot handle?
Do you need to build the chatbot from scratch or integrate with existing systems?
Should the chatbot handle real-time conversation context or stateless queries?

pipeline_stages.description: Set up chatbot framework and multilingual model integration (e.g., using LLM APIs with language detection)
Configure language routing and conversation flow for 4 languages (English, Arabic, Mandarin, Swahili)
Create domain-specific response templates and FAQs for each language
Test and evaluate chatbot performance across all languages

text: Build an agent that can browse the web, run code, and call our internal API to schedule meetings.

suggested_questions.question: What's your timeline for this project?
Do you have existing documentation for your internal API?
What framework or platform preference do you have?

text: A voice assistant that responds in under 200ms.

suggested_questions.question: What's the primary use case for this voice assistant?
Does it need to understand context across multiple turns, or just respond to individual queries?
What integration do you need? (This affects model selection & latency)

pipeline_stages.description: Accept voice input and convert to text (or receive transcribed text)
Process user query and generate response (inference must complete within ~150ms to meet 200ms total budget)
Convert response text to speech output
